h1: Anal Abscess Surgery - Benefits, Treatment Types & Recovery
meta_description: Anal abscess surgery is a procedure used to treat an infected anal abscess i.e., a collection of pus in the tissues surrounding the anus and rectum.
intro_paragraphs: Anal abscess surgery is a procedure used to treat an infected anal abscess i.e., a collection of pus in the tissues surrounding the anus and rectum. During the surgery, the abscess is drained and any surrounding inflamed tissue is removed. The operation provides relief from pain, swelling and infection and helps reduce the chances of bleeding and recurrence of the condition.

Anal abscess surgery is a procedure used to treat an infected anal abscess ... i.e., a collection of pus in the tissues surrounding the anus and rectum. During the surgery, the abscess is drained and any surrounding inflamed tissue is removed. The operation provides relief from pain, swelling and infection and helps reduce the chances of bleeding and recurrence of the condition. Read More

Your doctor will first suggest a complete assessment, after which he or she will decide whether to continue with the procedure based on the patient’s diagnosis and condition. Anal Abscess Diagnosis Some diagnostic tests for anal abscess may include: Physical examination: The doctor will perform a physical exam to look for signs of an abscess, including pain, tenderness, and signs of inflammation around the anus. Anal swab test: A swab test may be taken from the area around the anus to check for infection and determine the type of bacteria or fungi responsible. Anoscopy: An anoscope, or lighted tube, may be used to look inside the anus and rectum for signs of infection or disease. Ultrasound: This imaging test can help detect an abscess and measure its size and depth. CT scan: A CT scan can show soft tissue details that are helpful in diagnosing an abscess. MRI scan: An MRI may also be used to diagnose the presence of an abscess and its size and location in certain cases. During Anal Abscess Surgery Procedure of different types of Anal Abscess surgery is explained below: Incision and drainage : In this procedure, a small incision is made near the site of the abscess, and then the pus is allowed to drain out. After the draining is complete, a dressing may be placed in place to catch any additional drainage. Fistulotomy : This procedure involves making a larger opening in the wall of the abscess in order to allow for better drainage. Usually a local anaesthetic is used for this type of surgery, and stitches are used to close the wound once it is finished draining. The area where the abscess was located may be left open for a few days in order for additional drainage to take place. The wound will then be closed with stitches or skin glue.
og_title: Anal Abscess Surgery - Benefits, Treatment Types & Recovery

meta_description: Understand what is amh test for female and how it impacts fertility. Get in touch with the fertility experts at Pristyn Care to discuss your condition in detail and effective fertility-related personalised solutions.

Understand what is amh test for female and how it impacts fertility. Get ... in touch with the fertility experts at Pristyn Care to discuss your condition in detail and effective fertility-related personalised solutions. Read More

Anti-Mullerian Hormone , or AMH, is a protein that is generated by the testicles in men and the ovaries in women. Also called Mullerian-inhibiting hormone(MIH), AMH helps in the development and functioning of the reproductive organs in both men and women. Testicles are the glands that produce sperm & male hormones, and ovaries are the glands that produce female hormones and eggs. Granulosa cells in ovarian follicles secrete AMH, which gives information on a woman’s reproductive health. AMH levels in women represent the ovarian reserve, or the quantity of eggs left, and decrease with age until menopause. It affects sperm production and sexual development in men.
og_title: Anti Mullerian Hormone (AMH) Test, Normal Range & Diagnosis

Aspiration and sclerotherapy are two straightforward procedures used to treat kidney cysts, which are fluid-filled sacs that can cause pain or other issues. In aspiration, a doctor uses a needle to drain the fluid from the cyst. After that, sclerotherapy comes into play. This involves injecting a substance into the empty cyst, encouraging it to shrink and reduce the chances of coming back. The combination of these two treatments is typically more effective than aspiration alone.

A common question asked by many is ‘ what is astigmatism ?’ Astigmatism is an irregular curvature of the cornea or lens in our eyes. The treatment for astigmatism comprises several techniques employed by eye doctors (ophthalmologists) to correct the distorted or blurred vision caused by astigmatism . Treatment options range from eyeglasses that counteract the shape of your cornea or lens, to contact lenses designed specifically for astigmatism correction. In certain cases, refractive surgery such as laser-assisted in situ keratomileusis ( LASIK) or photorefractive keratectomy (PRK) might be recommended to reshape the cornea and correct these refractive errors.

h1: Axillary Lump: Meaning, Diagnosis & Treatment
meta_description: Axillary lump treatments are tailored to the specific conditions. Consult with the best doctors from Pristyn Care for appropriate advice. Book an appointment for a detailed examination, diagnosis, and effective treatment today.
intro_paragraphs: Axillary lumps, or abnormal growths in the armpit area, are usually caused by swollen lymph nodes or other abnormalities. Effective treatment can alleviate discomfort and prevent complications. There are various treatments available for axillary lumps. Breast cancer patients may require a sentinel lymph node biopsy. Individuals with painful axillary lumps, often caused by infections or cysts, also have treatment options. These treatments are tailored to the specific conditions. Consult with the best doctors from Pristyn Care for appropriate advice. Book an appointment for a detailed examination, diagnosis, and effective treatment today.

Axillary lump treatment typically involves surgery to remove lymph nodes or abnormal tissue from the armpit, or axilla region. This procedure is most commonly performed for breast cancer patients to remove cancerous lymph nodes. Also, it is performed to determine if the cancer has spread to the lymph nodes. In addition, axillary lump surgery can treat other conditions that cause lumps in this region, such as infections or cysts.

h1: Blocked Fallopian Tubes Treatment: Consult Today
meta_description: Blocked fallopian tubes, a leading cause of infertility, can seem daunting. However, overcoming this obstacle is entirely possible with the right treatment and care.
intro_paragraphs: Fallopian tube blockage is a condition where one or both of the fallopian tubes are obstructed, preventing the normal passage of eggs from the ovaries to the uterus. These tubes are essential for fertilisation because they are the pathway through which sperm travel towards the egg. When blocked, it can make it difficult for sperm to reach the egg, and for the fertilised egg to travel to the uterus for implantation. This often leads to infertility.

Fallopian tube blockage is a condition where one or both of the ... fallopian tubes are obstructed, preventing the normal passage of eggs from the ovaries to the uterus. These tubes are essential for fertilisation because they are the pathway through which sperm travel towards the egg. When blocked, it can make it difficult for sperm to reach the egg, and for the fertilised egg to travel to the uterus for implantation. This often leads to infertility. Read More

Fallopian tube blockage occurs when one or both of the tubes that connect the ovaries to the uterus become blocked or damaged. These tubes are essential as they allow the egg to travel from the ovary to the uterus and for sperm to reach the egg for fertilisation. When the fallopian tubes are blocked, they prevent pregnancy and can often lead to infertility in women .

Breast implant revision surgery is a secondary procedure which improves or corrects the results of a previous breast augmentation. Unlike the initial surgery, this one deals with complications or changes that occur over time. These include implant rupture, visible wrinkling, hardening due to scar tissue (capsular contracture), or dissatisfaction with size, shape, or symmetry.

intro_paragraphs: अगर आपको धुंधला दिखाई दे, दूर या पास का कम दिखाई दे, रात में देखने में कठिनाई, पढ़ने में परेशानी, रंगों का फीका पड़ना और चीज़ों का डबल दिखना जैसी समस्या से पीड़ित हैं तो संभल जाएं, यह आंखों में मोतियाबिंद के लक्षण भी सकते है। यदि आप मोतियाबिंद के प्रकार, निदान,उपचार एवं ऑपरेशन की सम्पूर्ण जानकारी लेना चाहते हैं तो प्रिस्टीन केयर के नेत्र रोग विशेषज्ञ से परामर्श करें।

Cataract removal with multifocal cataract lenses is a surgical intervention that seeks to restore clear vision by replacing the cloudy natural lens of the eye with specially designed multifocal intraocular lenses (IOL). This approach precisely addresses common vision afflictions that come with ageing, such as presbyopia, where individuals struggle to focus on close objects. The surgery is typically executed by an ophthalmologist and does not require hospital residency post-operation.

Cervical cerclage is a surgical treatment where doctors place a stitch around the cervix to keep it closed during pregnancy . The procedure uses a strong suture material that wraps around the cervix in a circular pattern to reinforce the tissue. Doctors recommend this treatment when the cervix cannot support the growing pregnancy because of weakness or previous injury. The added support helps prevent premature opening, which could lead to preterm birth or pregnancy loss between 14 and 28 weeks of gestation.

A chocolate cyst is a type of ovarian cyst filled with thick, dark blood that resembles chocolate syrup. Medically known as an endometrioma, this cyst forms when endometrial tissue grows outside the uterus and attaches to the ovaries. The tissue continues to respond to monthly hormonal changes, bleeding into the ovary and creating a cyst filled with old blood.

A cleft lip is a congenital condition in which there is a split or gap in the upper lip. It occurs during early pregnancy when the tissue that forms the lip does not fully come together. This can result in a visible gap or opening in the lip, and it can range in severity from a small notch to a larger gap that extends into the nose.

Coblation tonsillectomy is a surgical technique, designed for the removal of tonsils using radiofrequency energy at low temperatures and a saline solution. This approach results in a gentle and accurate removal of tonsil tissue, providing a stark contrast to traditional techniques like electrocautery or dissection with a scalpel, which can cause significant damage to surrounding healthy tissues.

Cochlear implants are electronic devices designed to provide a sense of sound to individuals with severe to profound hearing loss. Individuals who derive little or no benefit from traditional hearing aids can benefit from cochlear implants. Unlike hearing aids, which amplify sounds, cochlear implants bypass damaged parts of the inner ear (cochlea) and directly stimulate the auditory nerve.

Corneal transplant surgery , also known as corneal grafting or keratoplasty, is a surgical procedure designed to treat various corneal conditions that affect vision and cause discomfort. The cornea is the clear front layer of our eyes that focuses light to provide us with clear vision. When damaged or diseased by conditions such as keratoconus, Fuchs’ dystrophy, or corneal scarring, this crucial part of the eye can be replaced with healthy tissue from a donor. The operation is normally carried out by an eye specialist (ophthalmologist) on an OPD basis, which means there’s usually no need for an overnight hospital stay. Despite its complexity, corneal transplant surgery enjoys a high success rate and has become a common solution for severe corneal issues.

Proper management is essential to prevent the condition from getting worse and causing vision loss. Consult Pristyn Care's eye specialists in India to learn about the treatment options in detail. Book an appointment with our experts today. Read More

Diabetic retinopathy is a complication of diabetes that impacts the eyes. It occurs when high blood sugar levels damage the blood vessels in the retina, the light-sensitive tissue present at the back of the eye. In the initial stages, diabetic retinopathy may not cause prominent symptoms. As it progresses, you may experience symptoms such as blurred or patchy vision, floaters (spots or dark strings floating in your field of vision), difficulty seeing at night, eye pain or redness, and, eventually, vision loss.

h1: भारत में बेस्ट डायबिटिक रेटिनोपैथी ट्रीटमेंट सेंटर
meta_description: भारत में डायबिटिक रेटिनोपैथी उपचार के लिए सर्वश्रेष्ठ नेत्र विशेषज्ञों से परामर्श करें | आप के पास सबसे अच्छा नेत्र अस्पताल | लेजर नेत्र शल्य चिकित्सा | निशान-मुक्त और चीरा-मुक्त नेत्र शल्य चिकित्सा | आपके शहर में सर्वश्रेष्ठ नेत्र चिकित्सालय | नो कॉस्ट ईएमआई ट्रीटमेंट | बीमा दावों का समर्थन
intro_paragraphs: डायबिटीज़ से होने वाली आंखों की बीमारी (डायबिटिक रेटिनोपैथी) उन डायबिटिक कॉम्प्लिकेशन्स में से एक है जो आंखों को प्रभावित करती है। यह आंखों में मौजूद ब्लड वैसेल्स को नुकसान के कारण होता है या अधिक विशेष रूप से आंख के रेटिना में मौजूद होता है। भारत में डायबिटिक रेटिनोपैथी इलाज के विकल्पों के बारे में विस्तार से जानने के लिए हमारे नेत्र विशेषज्ञों से सलाह लें। आज ही विशेषज्ञों के साथ नि:शुल्क मुफ़्त अपॉइंटमेंट बुक करें।

डायबिटीज़ से होने वाली आंखों की बीमारी (डायबिटिक रेटिनोपैथी) उन डायबिटिक कॉम्प्लिकेशन्स में से एक है जो आंखों को प्रभावित करती है। यह ... आंखों में मौजूद ब्लड वैसेल्स को नुकसान के कारण होता है या अधिक विशेष रूप से आंख के रेटिना में मौजूद होता है। भारत में डायबिटिक रेटिनोपैथी इलाज के विकल्पों के बारे में विस्तार से जानने के लिए हमारे नेत्र विशेषज्ञों से सलाह लें। आज ही विशेषज्ञों के साथ नि:शुल्क मुफ़्त अपॉइंटमेंट बुक करें। और पढ़ें

डायबिटिक रेटिनोपैथी (Diabetic retinopathy) रेटिना की एक स्थिति या रेटीना की बीमारी है। रेटिना एक नर्व लेयर है जो आपकी आंख के पीछे की रेखा को दर्शाती है। यह आपकी आंख का हिस्सा भी है जो ‘तस्वीरें लेता है’ और छवियों को आपके मस्तिष्क में भेजता है। मधुमेह वाले कई लोगों में रेटिनोपैथी होती है। इस तरह के रेटिनोपैथी को डायबिटिक रेटिनोपैथी (मधुमेह के कारण होने वाली रेटिना की बीमारी) कहा जाता है। डायबिटिक संबंधी रेटिनोपैथी के परिणामस्वरूप खराब दृष्टि और यहां तक ​​कि अंधापन भी हो सकता है। इसे रेटीना की बीमारी भी कहते हैं।

meta_description: यदि आप इलाज के लिए सर्वश्रेत्र स्त्री रोग विशेषज्ञ की तलाश में है तो प्रिस्टिन केयर पर जाएं,और हमारे स्त्री रोग विशेषज्ञ से डाइलेशन और इवेक्युएशन (डी एंड ई) प्रक्रिया के लिए फ्री में सलाह लें प्राप्त करें!
intro_paragraphs: यदि आप गर्भावस्था से संबंधित किसी भी प्रकार के इलाज की कामना रखते हैं, तो प्रिस्टीन केयर आपका स्वागत करता है। आप हमारे स्त्री रोग विशेषज्ञ से परामर्श प्राप्त कर सकते हैं, जो डाइलेशन और इवेक्युएशन (डी एंड ई) प्रक्रिया में आपको उत्तम सुझाव देंगे और सही इलाज प्राप्त करने में आपकी सहायता करेंगे।

डाइलेशन और इवेक्युएशन (डी एंड ई) गर्भपात की एक प्रक्रिया का मेडिकल टर्म है। इस प्रक्रिया को गर्भावस्था के दूसरे तिमाही में किया जाता है। प्रक्रिया करने से पहले, डॉक्टर दर्द को कम करने के लिए एक दवा देते हैं। गर्भावस्था के चरण की जांच करने के लिए डॉक्टर प्रक्रिया से पहले एक अल्ट्रासाउंड करते हैं। डी एंड सी क्लीनिकों एवं अस्पतालों में किया जा सकता है। हमारे पैनल में कुछ ऐसे अस्पताल हैं, जिनके पास वह सभी उपकरण है जो इस प्रक्रिया को सुरक्षित बनाते हैं।

h1: Endoscopy Procedure: Types & Uses
meta_description: Discover the various types of endoscopy procedures, their medical uses, and potential risks. Stay informed for better health decisions today.
intro_paragraphs: Learn about endoscopy procedures, from how they're done to costs and side effects. Find out what to expect and make informed health decisions.
Learn about endoscopy procedures, from how they're done to costs and side effects. ... Find out what to expect and make informed health decisions. Read More

An endoscopy is a medical procedure that is used to look closely at the upper digestive tract. An endoscopy procedure involves a medical professional inserting an endoscope, a long, thin, flexible tube, into your body until it reaches the organ or area they want to examine. At the end of most endoscopes is a lens and a unique camera that captures images of body parts. The relevant area is illuminated by light traveling down the tube (via bundles of optical fibers), and the video camera enlarges the area and puts it onto a television screen so the doctor can see what’s there. During an endoscopy, healthcare professionals can perform surgery or implant devices to remove tissue.
og_title: Endoscopy Procedure: Risks, Types & Medical Uses

meta_description: Visit Pristyn Care and get advanced treatment for epidermal inclusion cyst. Book an appointment with our top gynecologist near you right away.

Visit Pristyn Care and get advanced treatment for epidermal inclusion cyst. Book an ... appointment with our top gynecologist near you right away. Read More

An epidermal inclusion cyst is a benign cyst usually found on the skin. It is one of the most common cutaneous cysts. These cysts can occur anywhere on the body, typically present as nodules directly underneath the patient’s skin. They can range in size from a few millimeters to several centimeters. They are generally asymptomatic. But, as the keratin accumulates within the cyst, the cyst may increase in size, become sore or painful, and eventually rupture, leading to drainage of white or yellow cheese-like material. The chances of epidermal inclusion cysts are higher in men than in women. Also, the chances of developing epidermal inclusion cysts are high in the 20s to 40s. Epidermal inclusion cysts are also known as infundibular cysts, keratin cysts, and epidermoid cysts.
og_title: Epidermal Inclusion Cyst Treatment

The flexor tendons are a part of your hand’s intricate system that enables you to bend and flex your fingers and thumb. These powerful, cord-like tissues connect the muscles in your forearm to the bones in your fingers and thumb. Each finger has two flexor tendons, while the thumb has one. These tendons pass through tunnels at the wrist and fingers, similar to how a bicycle brake cable works.

FUE, or follicular unit extraction, now popularly known as follicular transfer (FT), is an advanced hair transplant surgery technique. It involves taking individual hair follicles from the scalp and implanting them in the area where the bald patch is present. This technique was invented to replace the follicular unit transplantation or FUT technique. It has become very popular in the last decades, and many people prefer this method for hair transplantation over others.

By using your body's natural healing powers, GFC stimulates hair follicles, improves scalp health, and enhances hair density. For effective GFC treatment in India, consult a doctor at Pristyn Care. Growth factor concentrate (GFC) is a modern method for treating hair loss using your body’s own growth factors. This procedure targets androgenetic alopecia, a common form of hair loss that affects both men and women. The process begins with a simple blood draw from you. This blood is then spun in a machine called a centrifuge to separate and concentrate the platelets and growth factors. Once concentrated, these growth factors are injected directly into your scalp where you’re experiencing thinning or hair loss.

Hip arthroscopy is a minimally invasive surgical technique used by orthopaedic surgeons to diagnose and treat a variety of hip conditions. The procedure involves making small incisions around the hip area to insert a tiny camera, called an arthroscope, which transmits images to a video monitor. This allows the surgeon to view the hip joint without making a large cut. Arthroscopy is typically recommended when less invasive treatments, such as physiotherapy or medication, have not provided relief.

With a high success rate of 80% to 85%, this treatment helps couples ... conceive with minimal complications. At Pristyn Care, we provide advanced ICSI treatment at affordable prices. Book consultation with our fertility specialists now. Read More

ICSI, or Intracytoplasmic Sperm Injection, is a type of IVF procedure which is recommended in cases of male infertility . In the ICSI variation of IVF, live sperm is injected into a woman’s eggs to allow fertilization. Unlike traditional IVF, where thousands of sperm are kept next to eggs in a petri dish to promote fertilization, ICSI involves injecting the sperm directly, which increases the chances of fertilization.

h1: उच्च सफलता दर के साथ आईसीएसआई उपचार (ICSI Treatment)
meta_description: प्रिस्टिन केयर में हम किफ़ायती कीमतों पर एडवांस आईसीएसआई उपचार प्रदान करते हैं। हमारे फर्टिलिटी विशेषज्ञों के साथ नि:शुल्क परामर्श के लिए अभी अपॉइंटमेंट बुक करें।
intro_paragraphs: वर्तमान समय में बांझपन के मामलों में वृद्धि देखी गई है, जिसके कारण बांझपन के लिए आधुनिक उपचारों में भी वृद्धि हुई है। आईसीएसआई प्रक्रिया को बांझपन, मुख्यतः पुरुष बांझपन के एडवांस इलाज के रूप में देखा जाता है। आईसीएसआई को मुख्य रूप से आईवीएफ का हिस्सा भी माना जाता है। जब हम इस इलाज की सफलता दर की बात करते हैं, तो यह 80% से 85% तक है, जो इसे न्यूनतम जटिलताओं के साथ गर्भ धारण करने का उत्तम विकल्प बनाता है। प्रिस्टीन केयर में हम किफायती कीमतों पर उन्नत आईसीएसआई इलाज प्रदान करते हैं। हमारे फर्टिलिटी विशेषज्ञों के साथ अपना मुफ्त परामर्श अभी बुक करें।

वर्तमान समय में बांझपन के मामलों में वृद्धि देखी गई है, जिसके कारण बांझपन के लिए आधुनिक उपचारों में भी वृद्धि हुई है। ... आईसीएसआई प्रक्रिया को बांझपन, मुख्यतः पुरुष बांझपन के एडवांस इलाज के रूप में देखा जाता है। आईसीएसआई को मुख्य रूप से आईवीएफ का हिस्सा भी माना जाता है। जब हम इस इलाज की सफलता दर की बात करते हैं, तो यह 80% से 85% तक है, जो इसे न्यूनतम जटिलताओं के साथ गर्भ धारण करने का उत्तम विकल्प बनाता है। प्रिस्टीन केयर में हम किफायती कीमतों पर उन्नत आईसीएसआई इलाज प्रदान करते हैं। हमारे फर्टिलिटी विशेषज्ञों के साथ अपना मुफ्त परामर्श अभी बुक करें। और पढ़ें

आईसीएसआई को मेडिकल भाषा में इंट्रासाइटोप्लास्मिक स्पर्म इंजेक्शन कहा जाता है। यह एक आईवीएफ की प्रक्रिया है, जो पुरुषों में बांझपन या इनफर्टिलिटी के इलाज के लिए डॉक्टरों के द्वारा सुझाया जाता है। इस इलाज की प्रक्रिया में निषेचन या फर्टिलाइजेशन की प्रक्रिया के दौरान जीवित शुक्राणु को महिला के अंडों में इंजेक्ट किया जाता है। पारंपरिक आईवीएफ में फर्टिलाइजेशन के लिए पेट्री डिश में महिला के अंडे के बगल में हजारों शुक्राणु रखे जाते हैं, लेकिन आईसीएसआई में शुक्राणु को सीधे महिला के गर्भ में इंजेक्शन के द्वारा डाल दिया जाता है। ऐसा करने से फर्टिलाइजेशन होने की संभावना बढ़ जाती है।
og_title: उच्च सफलता दर के साथ आईसीएसआई उपचार (ICSI Treatment)

h1: Incisional Hernia Treatment - Diagnosis, Surgery & Recovery
meta_description: Surgical treatment is the only option if you are diagnosed with a Incisional hernia. Read on to learn everything about Incisional hernia and their treatment.
intro_paragraphs: Have you been diagnosed with a Incisional hernia? And looking for minimally invasive laparoscopic surgery? Book your appointment with India’s best laparoscopic surgeons at Pristyn Care and get your Incisional hernia repaired.

Have you been diagnosed with a Incisional hernia? And looking for minimally invasive ... laparoscopic surgery? Book your appointment with India’s best laparoscopic surgeons at Pristyn Care and get your Incisional hernia repaired. Read More

An incisional hernia develops when tissue or a portion of the intestine pushes through the weak abdominal muscles at a surgical site. It usually happens after an open abdominal surgery or a laparotomy. Your abdominal muscles are weaker after the procedure. This makes it easy for fat from your abdomen or portions of your intestines to protrude and cause a hernia. The hernia causes a lump or protrusion close to the scar from the laparotomy.

During a normal pregnancy or abortion, all pregnancy-related tissue should be expelled by the uterus. However, this process is not completed in the case of an incomplete abortion, leaving behind residual tissue. Common symptoms of an incomplete abortion include abdominal pain and vaginal bleeding.

Joint resurfacing surgery repairs damaged cartilage in major joints such as the hip, knee, and shoulder. Unlike total joint replacement, which involves replacing the entire joint, joint resurfacing focuses on smoothing and capping the damaged parts. This approach seeks to restore optimal joint function while preserving the patient’s natural bone structure as much as possible.

Knee Cartilage Repair is a specialised orthopaedic procedure designed to address damage to the knee joint’s cartilage. Our body’s natural buffering agent, cartilage often suffers wear and tear due to injury or diseases like osteoarthritis. Unfortunately, unlike other bodily tissues, cartilage has limited ability to heal independently, making surgical intervention necessary for significant damage. The primary goals of a knee cartilage repair treatment are multipronged – alleviation of pain, restoration of joint function, and potentially delaying the progress of arthritis.

intro_paragraphs: Anal fistulas can be quite uncomfortable, but there's a way to treat them effectively. It's called the ligation of the intersphincteric fistula tract (LIFT) surgery. This procedure is specially designed to treat anal fistulas, particularly those classified as transsphincteric, which are more complex. It's a minimally invasive fistula surgery that aims to preserve sphincter muscles, reducing the chances of complications like anal incontinence. The LIFT surgery for fistula is known for quicker healing and fewer recurrences compared to other methods like VAAFT (video-assisted anal fistula treatment). If you're dealing with an anal fistula, consult a doctor at Pristyn Care to discuss your treatment options.

Ligation of the intersphincteric fistula tract (LIFT) is a surgical procedure for treating anal fistulas. Anal fistulas are small tunnels that can form between the end of the bowel and the skin near the anus. They commonly occur after an abscess in the area has drained but not healed completely. LIFT is particularly useful for those fistulas that cross multiple layers of muscle called sphincters.

Lumbar Disc Replacement Surgery is a medical procedure specifically targeted at relieving back pain caused by damaged or degenerated intervertebral discs in the lumbar region of the spine. During this operation, your doctor removes the affected disc and replaces it with an artificial one, designed to restore normal spinal motion and alleviate pain. Unlike spinal fusion, which permanently joins two vertebrae together, Lumbar Disc Replacement maintains the natural movement of your spine, potentially leading to more favourable long-term outcomes.

A meatotomy is a medical procedure primarily used to treat disorders involving a narrow urethral opening, known as the urethral meatus. The urethra, located at the tip of the penis, plays a pivotal role in carrying urine from the bladder out of the body. In cases where this opening becomes constricted due to conditions like meatal stenosis, often resulting from scarring or irritation post- circumcision , urination may become painful or even problematic. In such instances, a doctor might recommend a meatotomy.

Medial Collateral Ligament Reconstruction Surgery is a medical procedure performed to repair a severely injured medial collateral ligament in the knee . The medial collateral ligament is one of the four major ligaments in the knee that provide stability and allow the joint to function properly. An injury or tear in this ligament can cause pain, swelling, and instability, making everyday activities difficult and painful. When conservative treatment fails or when the injury is severe — such as a Grade 3 tear — surgery might be recommended by your doctor.

It is often used to diagnose or monitor diseases such as pancreatitis, cancer, or blockages of the bile ducts. Read this page to learn more about MRCP.

It is often used to diagnose or monitor diseases such as pancreatitis, cancer, or blockages of the bile ducts. Read this page to learn more about MRCP.

MRCP (Magnetic Resonance Cholangiopancreatography) is a non-invasive imaging test that can help diagnose ... many conditions affecting the bile ducts and pancreas. It is often used to diagnose or monitor diseases such as pancreatitis, cancer, or blockages of the bile ducts. Read this page to learn more about MRCP. Read More

MRCP stands for Magnetic Resonance Cholangiopancreatography, which is a specialized imaging technique that uses magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) to visualize the bile ducts and pancreatic ducts. MRCP can help diagnose various conditions affecting the liver, gallbladder, bile ducts, and pancreas, such as gallstones, bile duct blockages, pancreatitis, and pancreatic tumors. The procedure is non-invasive and does not require any contrast dye or radiation exposure, which makes it a safe alternative to other imaging techniques like ERCP (endoscopic retrograde cholangiopancreatography) or CT (computed tomography) scans.

h1: MTP KIT - Uses, Benefits and Side Effects
meta_description: An MTP (Medical Termination of Pregnancy) kit is a combination of medications used for inducing a medical abortion. Mifepristone and misoprostol are two drugs present in it.
intro_paragraphs: MTP KIT is an effective and affordable method to terminate early pregnancies, up to 10 weeks. However, abortion with an MTP kit should be performed only by certified gynecologists at licensed clinics. Contact Pristyn Care to consult with the best gynecologists for MTP. Book your appointment now. Absolute privacy and confidentiality guaranteed.

MTP KIT is an effective and affordable method to terminate early pregnancies, up ... to 10 weeks. However, abortion with an MTP kit should be performed only by certified gynecologists at licensed clinics. Contact Pristyn Care to consult with the best gynecologists for MTP. Book your appointment now. Absolute privacy and confidentiality guaranteed. Read More

An MTP (Medical Termination of Pregnancy) kit is a combination of medications used for inducing a medical abortion. It typically contains two types of drugs: mifepristone and misoprostol. Mifepristone, taken first, works by blocking the hormone progesterone, which is necessary to sustain pregnancy. This causes the uterus lining to break down, detaching the embryo from the uterine wall. Misoprostol , taken after a certain interval following mifepristone, causes uterine contractions, leading to the expulsion of the embryo and uterine contents, similar to a miscarriage. The MTP kit is commonly used for terminating early pregnancies up to 9 weeks gestation and is considered safe and effective when used under medical supervision.
og_title: MTP KIT - Uses, Benefits and Side Effects

h1: Nabothian Cyst Treatment
meta_description: Get in touch with Pristyn Care to consult with the best gynecologist for Nabothian Cyst Treatment. No-Cost EMI Available. High Success Rate
intro_paragraphs: Nabothian cyst are benign cervical cysts that are frequently seen in women of reproductive age. If you have been diagnosed with Nabothian cysts, get in touch with Pristyn Care to consult with the best gynecologist for Nabothian Cyst Treatment.

Nabothian cyst are benign cervical cysts that are frequently seen in women of ... reproductive age. If you have been diagnosed with Nabothian cysts, get in touch with Pristyn Care to consult with the best gynecologist for Nabothian Cyst Treatment. Read More

Nabothian cysts are tiny cysts that form on the surface of your cervix. It is also known as a cervical canal. They are filled with mucus that is secreted by the cervical glands. Nabothian cysts usually form when the mucus-producing glands in your cervix are coated with skin cells and become clogged. Physical trauma and childbirth to the cervix can cause a Nabothian cyst. During childbirth, it grows on the mucus gland and traps mucus, causing cysts to form. Physical trauma around the cervix can cause excess tissue to develop on the top of mucus glands during the healing process and trap mucus, which can cause these cysts to occur.
og_title: Nabothian Cyst Treatment at No-Cost EMI | Book Free Consultation

Nephrectomy refers to the surgical removal of all or part of a kidney. This kidney removal surgery is typically performed when kidney disease has progressed to a stage where it can no longer be controlled with medication or other treatments. Kidney cancer, severe kidney trauma, or a kidney that isn’t functioning properly due to structural defects are common reasons for performing a nephrectomy .

Ocular surface reconstruction is a medical and surgical approach designed to treat severe ocular surface diseases (OSD), including structural damages caused by chemical burns, Stevens-Johnson syndrome, ocular cicatricial pemphigoid, and limbal stem cell deficiency. The goal of ocular surface reconstruction is to restore the normal function and integrity of the eye’s surface. This procedure involves multiple techniques that aim at repairing or replacing the damaged tissues on the cornea and conjunctiva, aiming to improve vision and restore normal ocular function. It is typically performed by an ophthalmologist in an operation theatre (OT) setting. Although the procedure is not without risks, ocular surface reconstruction ’s success rate has proven quite high.

h1: Ozempic Injection for Weight Loss
meta_description: Ozempic for weight loss is now available in India! Explore its effectiveness, benefits, and how it can help you achieve your health goals.
intro_paragraphs: Ozempic has gained widespread attention globally, not only for its effectiveness in controlling diabetes but in addressing significant weight gain. Recently, CDSCO, the Central Drugs Standard Control Organization, has approved the Ozempic usage in India, which will affect treatment choices and lifestyle changes for a large portion of the population struggling with diabetes and weight gain in India.

Ozempic has gained widespread attention globally, not only for its effectiveness in controlling ... diabetes but in addressing significant weight gain. Recently, CDSCO, the Central Drugs Standard Control Organization, has approved the Ozempic usage in India, which will affect treatment choices and lifestyle changes for a large portion of the population struggling with diabetes and weight gain in India. Read More

Ozempic is the brand name for semaglutide, an injectable medication used once a week and belonging to the GLP-1 receptor agonist class. It functions similarly to the natural hormone GLP-1, which helps in regulating the blood sugar levels in the body. It increases the release of insulin in response to elevated blood glucose levels, decreases incorrect glucagon secretion, delays stomach emptying, and suppresses hunger at higher dosages. In addition to diabetes management, it also supports weight loss, which makes it an effective dual-purpose drug popular worldwide.
og_title: Ozempic Injection for Weight Loss | Now legal in India

Polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS) is a highly prevalent disorder that affects various facets of fertility. PCOS is the most common among reproductive-aged women . Early diagnosis and long-term management can help control PCOD or PCOS and also help in avoiding other health complications. h1: Preimplantation Genetic Testing for Aneuploidy | PGTA Testing
meta_description: PGTA testing helps in screening the embryos for genetic abnormalities by identifying chromosomal abnormalities or specific inherited disorders.
intro_paragraphs: PGTA testing helps in screening the embryos for genetic abnormalities by identifying chromosomal abnormalities or specific inherited disorders. If you are struggling with unplanned miscarriages, IVF failures, and have parents or siblings with hereditary conditions, consult the experts at Pristyn Care.

PGTA testing helps in screening the embryos for genetic abnormalities by identifying chromosomal ... abnormalities or specific inherited disorders. If you are struggling with unplanned miscarriages, IVF failures, and have parents or siblings with hereditary conditions, consult the experts at Pristyn Care. Read More

Preimplantation genetic testing is one of the most advanced methods for detecting genetic defects in embryos produced through in vitro fertilization (IUI or ICSI ). This process entails taking a small number of cells from an embryo’s trophectoderm, or outer layer, in order to examine them for chromosomal abnormalities or to determine the prevalence of a specific genetic mutation linked to a number of diseases. The purpose of PGT is to enable your doctor to choose embryos for transfer that are anticipated to be free of chromosome abnormalities or a particular genetic issue. Before becoming pregnant, this test gives patients the ability to lower their child’s risk of inheriting a genetic condition.
og_title: PGTA Testing | Increase IVF Success Rate

Platelet-rich plasma therapy is a treatment that uses the healing power of blood to help heal damaged areas of the body. It involves drawing a small amount of blood, just like during a routine test. Then, it undergoes a special process to separate and concentrate the platelets. These tiny cells in the blood are rich in growth factors and proteins vital for healing and tissue regeneration.

Polypectomy is a surgical procedure to remove the polyps. Polyps are growths on the inside of one of your organs or body cavities. Polyps can be benign or malignant. In most cases, polyps are benign and do not cause any complications. Some polyps are in the precancerous stage, which means they must be removed before they start turning malignant. Generally, doctors recommend removing all polyps as a preventive measure.

Poor ovarian response is a condition where the ovaries respond inadequately to fertility medication during assisted reproduction techniques. It is often identified by the production of 3 or fewer eggs during a cycle of in-vitro fertilisation (IVF) , where eggs are fertilised outside the body. This may lead to decreased chances of successful pregnancy. Understanding what causes this response can be crucial for prevention and treatment.

The ovaries are central to female reproductive biology, involving hormonal signals and cellular processes that govern egg maturation. Oogenesis begins before birth, with primordial germ cells developing into primary oocytes, which remain in meiosis until puberty. During puberty, hormones such as Follicle-Stimulating Hormone (FSH) and Luteinising Hormone (LH) trigger oocyte maturation, which is crucial for fertility. The oocytes now resume meiosis, advancing to the second metaphase stage, where they remain until fertilization occurs. This process involves significant changes at the cellular level that are vital for early embryonic development. The process takes several months, with the final stages occurring just before ovulation. Successful maturation ensures that the released egg can fertilize and subsequent embryonic development.
og_title: Premature Ovarian Failure: Diagnosis & Treatment

Uterine prolapse or a prolapsed uterus is a condition in which the uterus of a woman slips down from its usual position into her vagina. The condition occurs when the muscles and ligaments that support the uterus weaken, often due to factors like childbirth, aging, repeated pressure, or weight lifting. The condition can cause discomfort, pressure, or even a bulging sensation in the pelvic area. It might also lead to issues with bladder or bowel control.

Prostatectomy is the surgical removal of the prostate gland. In some cases, the surgeons extract the complete gland. However, in other cases, partial removal is considered enough. This procedure can be performed through open, laparoscopic, or robotic techniques, depending upon the requirement of the case. The prostate gland is located in the male pelvis, right below the urinary bladder. This gland surrounds the urethra, and its chief function is to produce a fluid that nourishes the semen and transports it.

h1: भारत में प्रॉस्टेटेक्टोमी ऑपरेशन
meta_description: प्रोस्टेट कैंसर के मामले में प्रोस्टेट ग्लैंड को हटाने के लिए प्रॉस्टेटेक्टोमी ऑपरेशन किया जाता है। हालांकि, डॉक्टर इस प्रक्रिया का सुझाव अन्य स्वास्थ्य स्थिति के इलाज के लिए भी दे सकते हैं। प्रिस्टीन केयर में संपर्क करें और प्रोस्टेट बढ़ने के कारण और उपचार के संबंध में परामर्श प्राप्त करें।

यह प्रक्रिया प्रोस्टेट ग्लैंड को निकालने का ऑपरेशन है। कुछ मामलों में, सर्जन पूरे ग्लैंड को निकालने के लिए प्रोस्टेट के ऑपरेशन का सुझाव देते हैं। हालांकि, अन्य मामलों में, प्रोस्टेट ग्लैंड के कुछ भाग को ही निकाला जाता है। स्थिति के आधार पर डॉक्टर ऑपरेशन के प्रकार का निर्णय लेते हैं। इस रोग को ठीक करने के लिए तीन प्रकार के ऑपरेशन का सुझाव दिया जाता है; ओपन सर्जरी, दूरबीन से ऑपरेशन और रोबोट से ऑपरेशन। प्रोस्टेट ग्लैंड पुरुष श्रोणि में, मूत्राशय के ठीक नीचे स्थित होता है। यह ग्लैंड मूत्रमार्ग को घेरती है, और इसका मुख्य कार्य एक तरल पदार्थ का उत्पादन करना है, जो वीर्य को पोषण देता है और उसकी देखरेख करता है। आमतौर पर, प्रोस्टेट कैंसर और प्रोस्टेटिक हाइपरप्लासिया या बीपीएच (BHP) जैसी स्थितियों का इलाज इस प्रक्रिया से किया जाता है। किफायती दरों पर एडवांस प्रॉस्टेटेक्टोमी सर्जरी कराने के लिए प्रिस्टीन केयर के मूत्र रोग विशेषज्ञों से संपर्क करें।
og_title: भारत में प्रॉस्टेटेक्टोमी ऑपरेशन

Prostatitis is a discomforting and often painful condition which causes the prostate gland to become inflamed, swollen, and tender. The condition can affect men of all ages, and causes different symptoms including issues with urination such as difficulty urinating, urgency to urinate, blood or cloudiness in the urine, in addition to pain in the abdomen, groin, or lower back, discomfort in the penis or testicles, fever, chills, etc.

h1: प्रोस्टेट के सूजन का इलाज - Prostate In Hindi
meta_description: प्रोस्टेट के सूजन को प्रोस्टेटाइटिस कहा जाता है। यह रोग पुरुष के प्रजनन क्षमता को प्रभावित करता है। इसके कारण कई असुविधाजनक लक्षण दिखाई देते हैं। इस स्थिति की पुष्टि होने के पश्चात तुरंत इलाज या ऑपरेशन की आवश्यकता होती है। इस रोग की गिनती कुछ सामान्य रोगों की सूची में होती है, जिससे हर साल कई पुरुष प्रभावित होते हैं। यदि आप किफायती दरों पर आधुनिक प्रोस्टेट के सूजन का इलाज ढूंढ रहे हैं तो अभी प्रिस्टीन केयर से संपर्क करें।

Repeated implantation failure (RIF) refers to a situation where good-quality embryos fail to implant in the uterus after two or more IVF cycles. You might experience RIF due to various reasons like anatomical issues of the uterus, endocrine disorders, immunological factors, or even genetic abnormalities. Understanding these underlying causes might be your key to effective prevention and treatment of RIF.

h1: Retinal Detachment Treatment - Diagnosis, Surgery and Recovery
meta_description: If retinal detachment is left untreated, it can have severe consequences and possibly cause blindness. Consult with the best eye specialists for treatment.
intro_paragraphs: Are you seeing flashes of light or any tiny spots floating across the vision? This could be a symptom of retinal detachment. Consult the best-skilled ophthalmologists at Pristyn Care and to undergo advanced and affordable retinal detachment surgery. Book your appointment today.

Are you seeing flashes of light or any tiny spots floating across the ... vision? This could be a symptom of retinal detachment. Consult the best-skilled ophthalmologists at Pristyn Care and to undergo advanced and affordable retinal detachment surgery. Book your appointment today. Read More

Retinal detachment is a serious eye condition in which the retina, the thin layer of tissue at the back of the eye responsible for detecting light and sending visual information to the brain, becomes separated or pulled away from its normal position. Retinal detachment often occurs due to a tear or hole in the retina, which allows fluid to accumulate behind the retina. This buildup of fluid separates the retina from the underlying supportive tissue, disrupting its blood supply and causing it to detach. If you suspect any symptom of retinal detachment, it is important to seek immediate medical attention from an eye care professional. Prompt diagnosis and treatment are vital to prevent permanent vision loss.

h1: Retained Product of Conception Treatment: Experienced Doctors
meta_description: Struggling with retained products of conception (RPOC)? Our experienced gynecologists are here to help you address symptoms and avoid complications.
intro_paragraphs: Retained products of conception or RPOC is a medical term for the placental or fetal tissue that remains in the uterus after a pregnancy ends, either through delivery, miscarriage, or termination. If not treated promptly, it can lead to complications such as abnormal bleeding, pelvic pain, and potential long-term issues like infertility. If you are experiencing any related symptoms, reach out to our team. An appointment with our expert gynecologists can help you address your condition effectively.

If you are experiencing any related symptoms, reach out to our team. An appointment with our expert gynecologists can help you address your condition effectively. Read More

Retained product of conception treatment involves a range of therapeutic interventions aimed at removing residual placental or fetal tissue in the uterus following the end of pregnancy. This residual tissue can cause complications ranging from abnormal bleeding and pelvic pain to potential infertility. Depending upon the severity of the condition and the patient’s health, doctors may recommend expectant management, medical treatments, or operative procedures. The goal of each treatment modality is to effectively expel the unwanted tissue from the uterus while minimizing discomfort and risk to the patient.

Unlike total shoulder replacement that replaces both the humeral head and the glenoid (the socket), shoulder resurfacing only replaces the damaged surface of the humeral head with a prosthetic cap.

SILK Surgery is a pioneering vision correction method to treat myopia and astigmatism. The process begins with the application of numbing eye drops, after which an advanced femtosecond laser is used to carefully create a small disc-shaped lens, also known as a lenticule, within your cornea. This lenticule is then removed, resulting in the reshaping of your cornea and the consequent correction of any refractive errors.

Synovectomy is a surgical procedure in which the synovial membrane, which lines the joint capsule and produces synovial fluid, is removed. This procedure is commonly performed to treat various joint conditions, including rheumatoid arthritis, osteoarthritis , and injury to the joint. This procedure is mainly performed for the treatment of knee joints. As the knee joint is highly prone to inflammation and synovial fluid calcification.

Thigh liposuction is a cosmetic surgical procedure performed to reshape and slim down the thighs by removing excess fat deposits. These unwanted fat accumulations in the inner, outer, or front/back of the thighs can sometimes be stubborn and non-responsive to diet or exercise. The process involves making small incisions and using suction techniques to extract the fat. It is performed either under local or general anaesthesia depending on the patient’s needs and extent of the procedure. Thigh liposuction not only improves the appearance of your thighs but can also boost your confidence and comfort in clothing. However, it is not an alternative for weight loss, but rather a supplementary procedure that enhances body contouring. Post-procedure, recovery time is approximately 2-3 weeks but can vary based on individual health conditions. For lasting results, it is crucial to maintain a healthy weight and lifestyle after the procedure.
og_title: Thigh Liposuction Treatment | High Success Rate

TURP full form in medical in Hindi – ट्रांस यूरेथ्रल रिसेक्शन को आसान भाषा में टीयूआरपी ऑपरेशन कहा जाता है। यह एक मिनिमल इनवेसिव सर्जरी है, जिसमें बढ़े हुए प्रोस्टेट के लक्षणों से राहत दिलाई जाती है। भले ही अन्य इलाज के तकनीक क्यों न उपलब्ध हो, लेकिन लगभग 95% बीपीएच (BPH) के रोगियों को टीयूआरपी ऑपरेशन की आवश्यकता पड़ती है। इस ऑपरेशन को अक्सर बीपीएच के इलाज के लिए सबसे उत्तम इलाज माना जाता है, क्योंकि यह कम कीमतों पर इस समस्या के कारण उत्पन्न होने वाली जटिलताओं की बहुत कम कर राहत प्रदान करता है। शरीर पर बिना किसी कट के मूत्रमार्ग के माध्यम से प्रोस्टेट के कुछ हिस्सों को निकाला जाता है। प्रोस्टेट ग्लैंड मूत्राशय के नीचे, मूत्रमार्ग के आसपास स्थित होता है। जब यह आकार में बढ़ जाता है, तो यह मूत्रमार्ग को छोटा कर देता है, जिससे मूत्र संबंधी समस्याएं जैसे पेशाब में कठिनाई, पेशाब में दर्द आदि की समस्या उत्पन्न होती है। हालांकि रोग के प्रारंभिक चरणों में दवाएं थोड़ी प्रभावी हो सकती हैं, लेकिन अंततः ऑपरेशन सभी रोगियों के लिए सबसे अच्छा एवं उत्तम इलाज का विकल्प साबित हो सकता है। .

Trifocal lenses are eyeglasses or intraocular lenses designed to correct vision at three distances: near, intermediate, and far. They have three distinct optical zones, allowing for seamless transitions between different visual tasks, such as reading, computer work, and driving. Trifocal lenses are especially beneficial for individuals with presbyopia, a condition that affects the eye’s ability to focus on close objects as they age. These lenses can reduce the need for multiple pairs of glasses and improve overall visual clarity and convenience.

Progressive lenses, also known as multifocal lenses, are an innovative solution for those dealing with presbyopia – a common condition that affects your eyesight as you age. Unlike bifocal or trifocal lenses that have distinct sections or ‘zones’ for near and far vision, progressive lenses provide a smooth transition. This means that they offer clear vision at all distances – near, middle, and far.

Tubal ligation reversal is a surgery that aims to restore fertility in women. Many women have had tubal ligation, which prevents pregnancy by cutting, blocking, or sealing the fallopian tubes. The reversal surgery reconnects the severed or blocked fallopian tube segments. This reconnection creates a path for eggs to travel from the ovaries to the uterus, enabling conception.

Ureterocele is a medical condition where the lower end of the ureter – the tube that transports urine from the kidneys to the bladder – bulges or balloons out into the bladder. This congenital anomaly occurs due to improper formation during foetal development and is not associated with any actions or habits during pregnancy.

Uterine fibroids also known as leiomyoma/myoma are the most common tumors of the uterus. They are non-cancerous growths in the uterus that often appear during the reproductive years. Fibroids can differ in size, shape, and location. They can develop in the uterine wall, or on its surface. Initially, uterine fibroids generally cause minimal pain and do not show any signs or symptoms. Uterine fibroids treatment options include fibroid medication and surgical treatment. Best suited uterine fibroids treatment for you depends on the severity of the condition, the number, and the size of fibroids .

h1: रसौली (गर्भाशय फाइब्रॉएड) का इलाज - बच्चेदानी में गांठ होना

Uterus polyp removal is a surgical intervention aimed at eradicating uterine polyps, which are abnormal growths in the lining of the uterus (the endometrium). These polyps can cause various symptoms, including abnormal bleeding, discomfort in the lower abdomen (pelvic pain), and fertility issues. The removal of these polyps is often necessary for diagnosis and treatment, especially if they are suspected to be cancerous or causing significant discomfort.

VAAFT, or video-assisted anal fistula treatment, is an innovative and minimally invasive method to treat anal fistulas. An anal fistula is essentially a small tunnel that forms between the end of your bowel and the skin near your anus due to infection and abscess formation. If not addressed, these tunnels can cause discomfort and won’t heal on their own.

Vaginal bleeding refers to bleeding from the vagina, which can originate from the cervix, uterus, or the vagina itself. Normal vaginal bleeding is the regular blood flow from the uterus, known as menorrhea, which occurs during menstruation. However, abnormal vaginal bleeding occurs outside of a woman’s usual menstrual cycle or with unusual symptoms during menstruation.

h1: Advanced Vaginal Infection Treatment | Consult Female Gynaecologist
meta_description: Vaginal infections can be caused by bacteria, fungi, parasites, or viruses. Consult to our expert gynaecologists at Pristyn Care for personalized treatment.
intro_paragraphs: Vaginal infections can be caused by bacteria, fungi, parasites, or viruses. Some of these microorganisms naturally exist in your vagina without causing any issues. However, when they grow out of control, they can lead to infection or sometimes vaginal cyst in both your vagina and vulva (the area around your vagina). This can result in symptoms like soreness, itching, and changes in vaginal discharge.

Vaginal infection treatment typically depends on the underlying cause of the infection. For bacterial or yeast infections, our doctors may prescribe antibiotics or antifungal medications to restore the natural balance of bacteria in the vagina. If the infection is caused by a viral issue, such as herpes, antiviral medications may be recommended. In some cases such as vaginal cysts , over-the-counter treatments can be effective for mild infections, but it is important to seek medical advice to ensure the right treatment.

Vaginal itching is an uncomfortable feeling of irritation or soreness in or around the vagina, often accompanied by a strong urge to scratch. It may also come with symptoms such as redness, swelling, or a general sense of discomfort. There are several potential causes, including infections like yeast infections or bacterial vaginosis, allergic reactions to soaps, detergents, or fragrances, or hormonal changes. In some instances, it could also signal a sexually transmitted infection (STI) or a skin condition such as eczema or psoriasis.

h1: Advanced Vaginal Swelling Treatment | Consult Female Gynaecologist
meta_description: Vaginal Swelling is the enlargement or puffiness of the tissues in or around the vaginal area. Consult to our expert gynaecologists at Pristyn Care today.
intro_paragraphs: Vaginal Swelling is the enlargement or puffiness of the tissues in or around the vaginal area. It can happen for several reasons, such as infections (like yeast infections or bacterial vaginosis), allergies, injury, hormonal changes, or conditions like cysts or pelvic inflammatory disease (PID). Swelling is often accompanied by other symptoms, including redness, itching, pain, or abnormal discharge, depending on the cause. At Pristyn Care, our experienced gynaecologists are committed to providing comprehensive care.

Treatment for vaginal swelling depends on its underlying cause. If the swelling is due to an vaginal infection , such as a yeast infection or bacterial vaginosis, a doctor may prescribe appropriate medications, like antifungals or antibiotics. For inflammation or irritation, over-the-counter creams or ointments may help soothe the area, although it is important to ensure these are suitable for vaginal use.

Vitreo Retina treatment is carried out by skilled ophthalmologists who specialise in disorders of the retina, macula, and vitreous fluid. Procedures include laser therapy, injections, surgeries like vitrectomy and scleral buckling, cryotherapy, and pneumatic retinopexy, each tailored according to disease type and severity.

h1: Weight Loss Injections​: Types, Uses & Benefits
meta_description: Curious about weight loss injections? Explore various types, their uses, and how they can help you achieve your weight loss goals effectively.
intro_paragraphs: Curious about weight loss injections? Explore various types, their uses, and how they can help you achieve your weight loss goals effectively.
Curious about weight loss injections? Explore various types, their uses, and how they ... can help you achieve your weight loss goals effectively. Read More

Weight loss injections have recently gained widespread attention as an emerging effective weight loss treatment for those struggling with obesity . They mimic GLP-1(glucagon-like peptide-1) hormone, which the body releases after eating, and are hence called GLP-1 agonists. GLP-1 agonists were initially designed for type 2 diabetes treatment by triggering the release of insulin into the bloodstream. Additionally, GLP-1 slows down the digestion and reduces the appetite, which makes you feel fuller even after eating less. Consequently, you eat less and feel less hungry while also losing weight.
og_title: Weight Loss Injections​: Types, Uses & Benefits

Weight loss tablets are a clinically proven option for people who have not achieved sufficient weight loss through lifestyle intervention alone and are looking for a non-surgical weight loss treatment option. These medications work through various mechanisms such as appetite suppression, increased satiety, or reduced fat absorption. Usually, people can lose up to 3% to 12% of their body weight with the fat burner capsules​ . Common weight loss pills prescription options include orlistat, phentermine-topiramate, naltrexone-bupropion, liraglutide, and semaglutide. Weight loss medications are most effective when combined with lifestyle interventions like a calorie-controlled diet and regular physical activity.
